## Type of Change
- [ ] 🐛 Bug fix
- [ ] ✨ New feature

## Testing Done
- [ ] Unit tests added or updated
- [ ] Manual testing completed on local dev
- [ ] Tested on staging environment
- [ ] No testing needed (docs/config only)

## Security Checklist
- [ ] No hardcoded credentials, secrets, or API keys
- [ ] No PII or sensitive data in logs
- [ ] Input validation added for any new endpoints
- [ ] Auth/authorization verified for new routes
- [ ] Dependencies added are from trusted sources

## Accessibility (UI changes only)
- [ ] `accessibilityLabel` / `aria-label` added to all interactive elements
- [ ] Color contrast meets WCAG 2.1 AA (4.5:1 minimum)
- [ ] Keyboard navigation works correctly
- [ ] Touch targets are 44px minimum

## Deploy Notes
- [ ] Environment variables documented in `.env.example`
- [ ] Database migrations included (if needed)
- [ ] Backwards compatible with existing API clients
- [ ] No breaking changes to mobile app APIs
